notes:
Game worked out of the box except for the cutscenes, but these can be fixed downloading the appropriate version of mfplat.dll and using the mf fix on https://github.com/tonix64/python-installcab
After the fix everything works, cutscenes included. In around 3 hours of gameplay I've experienced only about 3 game freezes that forced me to restart the computer, but after restart the game continued to work, and since the game saves automatically nothing more than a few minutes are lost.

title: Darksiders Warmastered Edition

notes:
NOTE: Could not fix cutscene issue with MF Fix.
If you have set it up successfully please pm me (https://steamcommunity.com/id/SlipSlapSlop/) and post clear instructions here on ProtonDB.

Game runs fine but no cut scenes renders game unplayable in my opinion.

Steps taken:
1. Installed winetricks from Manjaro repos.
2. Downloaded zip from Tonix Github: https://github.com/tonix64/python-installcab
3. Ran winetricks mf d3dcompiler_43
4. Ran install-mf-64.sh in game directory.
5. Tested two versions of mfplat.dll from DLLme and Lutris (https://lutris.net/games/install/6805/view).
6. Tried doing same process using 32-bit (rm -rf /home/user/.wine, WINEARCH=win32 wineboot, winetricks mf d3dcompiler-43, ran install-mf.sh and used both DLLs again.

title: Darksiders Warmastered Edition

notes:
Works out of the box, except for video screensavers. IN QUOTES, TERMINAL COMMAND!
Fixing:
Memorize the number of the game in Steam: 462780
Find Wine Prefix 462780 in Steam path: /PATH_TO_STEAM/steamapps/compatdata/462780/pf
Open a terminal and download MF using winetricks:
"env WINEPREFIX=/PATH_TO_STEAM/steamapps/compatdata/462780/pfx /usr/bin/winetricks mf"
Download and unpack: https://github.com/tonix64/python-installcab
In terminal:
"cd ~/Downloads/python-installcab-master/"
"export WINEPREFIX=/PATH_TO_STEAM/steamapps/compatdata/462780/pfx"
"./install-mf-64.sh"
At the end they write to us:
Done!
Now you need to get mfplat.dll version 12.0.7601.23471 from elsewhere and place it in your application directory.
I found mfplat.dll 12.0.7600.16385 in google and dropped it into the game folder: PATH_TO_STEAM/steamapps/common/Darksiders Warmastered Edition
Done, the videos are working!
title: Darksiders Warmastered Edition
